rules: CRITICAL: Must flush stdout after every query (e.g. `std::cout << std::flush;`).
It acts as the jury. It reads the hidden test case from `argv[1]`.
It reads queries from `std::cin`, validates them, and writes answers to `std::cout` (flush!).
Keep track of query count. Return 1 (WA) if limit exceeded or guess is wrong.
Generates the hidden state for the interactor.
